3:00
Timer

Skin Care Routine

Morning
1. Gentle cleanser → splash water
2. Moisturizer (light, non-comedogenic)
3. SPF 30+ — every morning, even indoors
Evening
1. Cleanse (sweat = breakouts after practice)
2. Treatment serum (if any) — niacinamide or BHA
3. Moisturizer — heavier for night
Pro tip: SPF is the single highest-ROI habit for skin long-term. Even on cloudy days.

Health Data Source
Apple Watch sync requires the native iOS shell (HealthKit is iOS-only, not accessible from web). Until that ships, log your watch data manually below — the AI will use it the same way.
AI Coach & Voice
The King · Local Engine
Run on-device via OpenJarvis — no cloud required
Use local OpenJarvis engine
▸ How to start OpenJarvis locally
1. Install: curl -fsSL https://openjarvis.ai/install.sh | bash
2. Start: jarvis serve
3. Default URL: http://localhost:8000
The King tries local first, falls back to Claude if unreachable.
⚠️ Stored on this device only. Live AI is normally provided by the app server (your key is not needed). If you choose to enter your own OpenAI/Anthropic key:
  • It is kept in local secure storage and never synced to the cloud.
  • It is sent directly to the provider's API from this device.
  • You are responsible for any usage charges on that account.
Leave blank for normal use.
Uses your device's built-in voices. For premium athlete-style voices we'd need a licensed TTS provider.

Security & privacy?
🔐
End-to-end encryption · Active
All your data is encrypted on-device. Anthropic never sees your stats.
Report a bug?
Hit something weird? Tell us. Reports go through the same encrypted channel as your data.

Past reports (0)

Reset all data
Restores every value to factory defaults. Cannot be undone.
Delete account
Permanently removes your ASCEND account and every record we hold for you — sleep, HR, HRV, workouts, shot sessions, and all linked integrations. This action is irreversible and takes effect within 30 days. Connected services (WHOOP, Oura, Fitbit, Strava, Garmin, Plaid) will be disconnected on your behalf.

The King is autonomous — it shifts workouts based on recovery, reorders tasks by deadline, suggests meals to hit macros, and surfaces patterns. Every action is logged here for transparency. Approve / reject any of them.
